stories.title: Initialize Project with Next.js and Supabase
stories.description: Set up the Next.js 14 project with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase integration. Configure all development tools including ESLint, Prettier, and Husky git hooks.
acceptanceCriteria: Next.js 14+ project initialized with App Router
Husky git hooks set up (pre-commit: lint + format)

stories.title: Create Database Schema and RLS Policies
stories.description: Create PostgreSQL database schema for user profiles and audit logs. Set up Row Level Security policies to protect user data. Create database triggers for automatic profile creation.
acceptanceCriteria: profiles table created with proper schema
audit_logs table created for security logging
RLS enabled on all public tables
RLS policies created (users can view/update own profile)

stories.title: Set Up Authentication Infrastructure
stories.description: Create Supabase client instances for different environments (browser, server, middleware). Set up AuthProvider React Context, authentication hooks, and middleware for protecting routes.
acceptanceCriteria: useAuth hook implemented (user, session, loading, signIn, signUp, signOut)

stories.title: Build Signup Form and API
stories.description: Create signup page with form validation using React Hook Form and Zod. Implement API route for user registration. Add real-time password strength indicator.
acceptanceCriteria: SignupForm component with email, password, full_name fields
Error handling (duplicate email, weak password, etc.)

stories.title: Build Login Form and API
stories.description: Create login page with email/password authentication. Implement rate limiting to prevent brute force attacks. Add remember me functionality.
acceptanceCriteria: LoginForm component with email and password fields
Rate limiting (5 attempts per 15 min per IP) using Upstash Redis
Generic error message (don't reveal if email exists)
Success redirects to dashboard or original destination

stories.title: Implement Session Management and Logout
stories.description: Implement session validation, token refresh, and logout functionality. Ensure sessions persist across page reloads and refresh automatically before expiration.
acceptanceCriteria: Session validates on app mount (useEffect in AuthProvider)
Expired sessions automatically refresh using refresh token
Logout redirects to home or login page
Loading states shown during auth checks

stories.title: Create Protected Routes and Dashboard
stories.description: Create dashboard page (protected) and implement route protection via middleware. Unauthenticated users should be redirected to login with return URL saved.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard shows welcome message with user's name
After login, user redirected back to original destination
Loading state shown during auth check

stories.title: Implement Google OAuth Login
stories.description: Integrate Google OAuth 2.0 for social login. Handle OAuth callback, create or link user accounts, and extract user profile information from Google.
acceptanceCriteria: Google OAuth app configured in Google Cloud Console
Google Client ID and Secret added to environment variables
Continue with Google button functional on login/signup pages
Clicking button redirects to Google OAuth consent screen
Exchange authorization code for access token
Fetch user profile from Google (email, name, avatar)
If email exists, link Google identity to existing user
If email new, create new user with Google identity
OAuth errors handled gracefully (show user-friendly message)

stories.title: Implement GitHub OAuth Login
stories.description: Integrate GitHub OAuth 2.0 for social login. Similar to Google OAuth but with GitHub-specific implementation.
acceptanceCriteria: GitHub OAuth app configured in GitHub settings
GitHub Client ID and Secret added to environment variables
OAuth flow works (authorize, callback, profile fetch)

stories.title: Build Password Reset Flow
stories.description: Implement password reset functionality via email. Users can request a reset link, receive email, and set a new password using a time-limited token.
acceptanceCriteria: Email sent with reset link (if email exists)
Reset link contains time-limited token (1 hour expiry)
Token must not be expired or already used
User can log in with new password

stories.title: Build User Profile Page
stories.description: Create user profile page where users can view and edit their profile information (name, bio), upload avatar, and view connected social accounts.
acceptanceCriteria: Shows current profile (full_name, email, bio, avatar)
Form to edit full_name and bio
POST /api/user/avatar uploads avatar to Supabase Storage
Validation (name length, bio length, image size/type)

stories.title: Implement Password Change in Settings
stories.description: Add password change functionality in user settings. User must provide current password for verification before setting a new password.
acceptanceCriteria: Form to change password (current, new, confirm)
Current password verified before allowing change
Optional: Logout all other sessions checkbox

stories.title: Add Security Features (Rate Limiting, CSRF, Headers)
stories.description: Implement comprehensive security measures: rate limiting, CSRF protection, security headers, and audit logging for all authentication events.
acceptanceCriteria: Rate limiting implemented with Upstash Redis (Login: 5/15min, Signup: 3/hour, Reset: 3/hour, API: 100/min, Avatar: 5/hour)
CSRF protection implemented (double submit cookie pattern)
Security headers set in middleware (HSTS, CSP, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy)
Audit logging for auth events (login, logout, password change, etc.)
IP address and user agent captured in logs
All API routes protected by rate limiting
CSRF tokens validated on state-changing requests

stories.title: Create Comprehensive Test Suite
stories.description: Write comprehensive test suite covering unit tests, integration tests, and E2E tests for all authentication flows and features.
acceptanceCriteria: Integration test coverage > 70% (All API routes, Database operations)
E2E tests for critical paths (Signup, Login, OAuth, Password reset, Protected routes, Session persistence, Profile update)
Test configuration files set up (vitest.config.ts, playwright.config.ts)
CI configured to run tests on PR

stories.title: Accessibility Audit and WCAG 2.1 AA Compliance
stories.description: Conduct accessibility audit and ensure WCAG 2.1 AA compliance. Fix any accessibility issues found.
acceptanceCriteria: Focus indicators visible on all interactive elements
Form errors announced to screen readers
Landmark regions defined (header, nav, main, footer)

stories.title: Performance Optimization and Lighthouse Score
stories.description: Optimize application performance to meet constitution requirements: page load < 2s, API response < 300ms, Lighthouse score > 90, bundle size < 150kb.
acceptanceCriteria: Bundle analysis shows no unnecessary large dependencies

stories.title: Documentation (README, API Docs, User Guide)
stories.description: Create comprehensive documentation including README, API documentation, user guide, and developer guide.
acceptanceCriteria: README.md updated with project description, features, tech stack, installation, deployment
User guide created (how to use the app)
Developer guide created (how to contribute, architecture overview)
Code comments added where necessary (complex logic)

stories.title: Production Deployment and Monitoring
stories.description: Deploy application to production on Vercel. Set up monitoring, error tracking, and alerting. Configure production environment variables.
acceptanceCriteria: Production environment variables configured in Vercel
Sentry project created for error tracking
